title: Bath Sheets - Extra Large Bathroom Sheet Set – Pack of 2 Jumbo Towels White (90x180cm) – 100% Cotton Soft Quick Dry Large Bath Towels for Adults Hotel Spa Bathroom Use
features: Extra Large Bath Sheets Towels (90x180cm): Enjoy maximum coverage and comfort with this jumbo size. These extra large bath towels for adults are ideal for full-body drying and lounging.
100% Cotton Quick Dry Towels: Crafted from soft, breathable cotton bath sheet material. These large bathroom towels are super absorbent and dry quickly to prevent dampness.
Multipurpose Use – Hotel, Spa, Gym & Home: These luxury bath sheets are perfect for spa towels, hotel towels, gym use, or bath towels for home – versatile and elegant
Set of 2 Big Bath Towels Extra Large – Long Lasting: Durable stitching and absorbent fabric ensure these towels remain soft and thick even after frequent washes. Great choice for large towel sets.

Stylish Colors to Match Any Bathroom: Bath towels are available in popular shades like Black, White, Grey, Navy Blue, and other. Add elegance to your bathroom with our collection of jumbo bath sheets.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Will the color of the bath sheet look exactly the same as in the pictures? Yes, you will receive the exact color shown. Our photos are taken with high-quality shoots to display true shades, but slight variations may occur due to screen resolution or lighting. Is the bath sheet soft and absorbent? Yes, crafted from premium cotton, the bath sheet is luxuriously soft and highly absorbent for quick drying and maximum comfort. How large is the bath sheet compared to a regular towel? Our bath sheet measures 90×180 cm, much larger than a standard towel, offering full body coverage and extra comfort after a bath or shower. Will the bath sheet stay soft after multiple wash? Yes, thanks to premium cotton fibers, it stays soft and fluffy even after repeated washing. How do I wash and care for the bath sheet? Easy care – machine wash at 40°C and tumble dry on low. Wash dark colors separately to maintain fabric quality.
